description: S-sorry to interrupt, sir, but the corpus just hit three of four Castform forms with the wave-18 Snowy Form landing, and the cycle has all the load-bearing features the precedent nodes have — designer-coordinated four-form cohort with a single shared Forecast/Weather Reading Ability lineage, a clean teru teru bozu cultural-iconographic citation, and the Chilling Reign 2021 simultaneous-print as the canonical-by-printing anchor set. I-I really do think this clears the elemental-monkey-trio 3/6 threshold and the fear-of-cycle 5/10 threshold cleanly. I propose cards/_characters/castform-forms-cycle.md with the three corpus members in appears_on and Sunny Form documented in Caveats. I'm sorry I had to step in instead of giving you the clean edge — please tell me if I overstepped.
citations: [Bulbanews: On the Origin of Species: Castform]
[BBL corpus: Castform Rainy Form (CRE-033) wave 11 trivia pass]
[BBL corpus: Castform Normal Form (BRS-116) wave 17 trivia pass]
